title: Protein expression on the surface of Escherichia coli
author: Maja Rennig
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfh4jj8w

steps.title: Pick a fresh colony of your...
steps.instruction: Pick a fresh colony of your BL21 (DE3) strain with your expression vector, and inoculate it in LB supplemented with relevant antibiotics. Grow the culture at 37 °C at 250 RPM shaking Overnight . The volume of the overnight culture depends on the volume of the expression culture and should be at least 1/100 of the expression culture

steps.title: Dilute the overnight culture 1:100 in...
steps.instruction: Dilute the overnight culture 1:100 in fresh LB supplemented with relevant antibiotics

steps.title: Grow the culture at 37 °C...
steps.instruction: Grow the culture at 37 °C with 250 RPM shaking until an OD 600 = 0.5 - 0.6

steps.title: Induce expression by adding L-rhamnose to...
steps.instruction: Induce expression by adding L-rhamnose to a final concentration of 5 millimolar (mM)

steps.title: Let the culture grow at 30...
steps.instruction: Let the culture grow at 30 °C with 250 RPM shaking for up to 20:00:00

steps.title: Spin the culture down at 4000...
steps.instruction: Spin the culture down at 4000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes and discard the supernatant

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in the desired assay buffer (e
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in the desired assay buffer (e.g. 10 millimolar (mM) - 50 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl)

steps.title: Run activity assay in liquid or on agar plates
steps.instruction: Run activity assay in liquid or on agar plates.

steps.title: Spin the culture down at 4000...
steps.instruction: Spin the culture down at 4000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes and discard the supernatant

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 10 millimolar (mM)...
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 10 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl or 100 µL /ODU TEV cleavage buffer ( 10 millimolar (mM) Tris-HCl pH 7.5 , 150 millimolar (mM) NaCl 2 , 0.5 millimolar (mM) EDTA)

steps.title: Add purified and activated TEV protease
steps.instruction: Add purified and activated TEV protease

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature Overnight (~...
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature Overnight (~ 16:00:00 ) It is also possible to shorten the incubation time, so that the protein harvest can still be performed on the same day.

steps.title: Spin the cells at 5000 x...
steps.instruction: Spin the cells at 5000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes and collect the supernatant

steps.title: Keep the extractions On ice when...
steps.instruction: Keep the extractions On ice when working with it and at 4 °C for storage
